---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r}
library(VennDiagram)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ChIPseeker)
library(TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(plyranges)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(AnnotationHub)
library(patchwork)
library(ggplotify)
library(grid)
library(magick)
```


```{r}
setwd("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/3_CTCF/")
DMSO_peaks = read.table("1_diffpeaks/GSC_CTCF_downSig_peaks.bed", header = F)
DP_peaks = read.table("1_diffpeaks/GSC_CTCF_upSig_peaks.bed", header = F)
stable_peaks = read.table("1_diffpeaks/GSC_CTCF_nonSig_peaks.bed", header = F)

DMSO_peaks$peak = paste0(DMSO_peaks$V1,":",DMSO_peaks$V2,"_",DMSO_peaks$V3)
DP_peaks$peak = paste0(DP_peaks$V1,":",DP_peaks$V2,"_",DP_peaks$V3)
stable_peaks$peak = paste0(stable_peaks$V1,":",stable_peaks$V2,"_",stable_peaks$V3)

# Define your sets
set1 <- c(DMSO_peaks$peak, stable_peaks$peak)
set2 <- c(DP_peaks$peak, stable_peaks$peak)

# Create a list of sets
data_list <- list(DMSO = set1, DP = set2)

# Prepare a palette with R colorbrewer:
myCol <- brewer.pal(2, "Pastel2")

# Chart
p = venn.diagram(
        x = list(set1, set2),
        category.names = c("DP" , "DMSO "),
        filename = NULL,
        output=TRUE,
        
        # Output features
        imagetype="png" ,
        height = 2 , 
        width = 2 , 
        resolution = 300,
        compression = "lzw",
        units = "in",
        
        # Circles
        lwd = 2,
        lty = 'blank',
        fill = myCol[1:2],

        # Numbers
        cex = 1,
        fontface = "bold",
        fontfamily = "sans",
        
        # Set names
        cat.cex = 1,
        cat.fontface = "bold",
        cat.default.pos = "outer",
        cat.pos = c(-25, 25),
        cat.dist = c(-0.45, -0.45),
        cat.fontfamily = "sans"
)

tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".png")
png(tmp, width = 3, height = 3, units = "in", res = 600)
print(p)
dev.off()

p_img <- png::readPNG(tmp)

p_gg <- ggplot() +
  annotation_raster(p_img, xmin = 0, xmax = 1, ymin = 0, ymax = 1) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1), clip = "on") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = NULL, expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = NULL, expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.margin    = margin(0, 0, 0, 0),
    axis.text      = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks     = element_blank(),
    axis.title     = element_blank(),
    panel.border   = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_blank()
  )

Fig_3A = p_gg

```

```{r}
###CTCF motifs
ah <- AnnotationHub()
query_data <- subset(ah, preparerclass == "CTCF")
query_data

query_data$dataprovider %>% table()
CTCF_hg38_all <- query_data[["AH104727"]]
write.table(CTCF_hg38_all %>% sort() %>% as.data.frame(), 
            file = "1_diffpeaks/CTCF_hg38_all.bed",
            sep = "\t", row.names = FALSE, col.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE)

```

```{r}
txdb <- TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene

setwd("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/3_CTCF/")
files=list.files("2_allpeaks_anno/", pattern = "bed")
plots=list()
for (i in 1:3) {
  peak <- readPeakFile(paste0("2_allpeaks_anno/",files[[i]]))
  
  peakAnno <- annotatePeak(peak, tssRegion=c(-3000, 3000),
                         TxDb=txdb, annoDb="org.Hs.eg.db")
  
  pdf(paste0("2_allpeaks_anno/", gsub(".bed","_anno.pdf",files[[i]])))
  plotAnnoPie(peakAnno)
  dev.off()
  
  tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".png")
  png(tmp, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in", res = 300)
  plotAnnoPie(peakAnno)
  dev.off()
  
  p_img <- image_read(tmp)
  p_img_cropped <- image_trim(p_img)
  p_gg <- ggplot() +
    annotation_raster(p_img_cropped, xmin = 0, xmax = 1, ymin = 0, ymax = 1) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1), clip = "on") +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = NULL, expand = c(0, 0)) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = NULL, expand = c(0, 0)) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(
      plot.margin    = margin(0, 0, 0, 0),
      axis.text      = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks     = element_blank(),
      axis.title     = element_blank(),
      panel.border   = element_blank(),
      panel.background = element_blank()
    )
  plots[[length(plots) + 1]] <- p_gg
}
Supp_4A = plots[[1]]
Supp_4B = plots[[2]]
Supp_4C = plots[[3]]



```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
setwd("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/3_CTCF/")
files=list.files("3_allpeaks_te/", pattern="*counts.txt")

for (i in 1:1) {
  counts=read.csv(paste0("3_allpeaks_te/", files[[i]]), sep = "")
  counts$nonTE=counts$all-counts$TE
  counts$peaks = c("CTCF Lost","Unchanged","CTCF Gained")
  
  # Sample data
  data <- data.frame(
    peak = c(counts$peaks, counts$peaks),
    count = c(counts$TE, counts$nonTE),
    type = rep(c("TE", "nonTE"), each = 3)
  )
  data$peak <- factor(data$peak, levels=c("Unchanged", "CTCF Lost", "CTCF Gained"))
  
  # Create the stacked bar plot
  p = ggplot(data, aes(x = peak, y = count, fill = type)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill") +
    labs(title = "",
         x = "Peak Type",
         y = "Number of Peaks",
         fill = "Type") + theme(text = element_text(size = 14), panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), 
        panel.background = element_blank(), axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) + scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) 
  pdf(paste0("3_allpeaks_te/", gsub(".txt",".pdf",files[[i]])))
  print(p)
  dev.off()
}
Fig_3G = p

files=list.files("3_allpeaks_te/", pattern="*TE_coverage.bed")
merged_coverage = data.frame()
for (i in 1:3) {
  coverage=read.csv(paste0("3_allpeaks_te/", files[[i]]), sep = "", header=F)
  coverage$peaks = paste0(gsub("_peaks_coverage.bed","",gsub("GSC_CTCF_","",files[[i]])))
  merged_coverage = rbind(merged_coverage, coverage)
}
merged_coverage$peaks = gsub("_withDI_new_25kb_CTCF_TE_coverage.bed","",merged_coverage$peaks)
merged_coverage$`Boundary Type` = ifelse(merged_coverage$peaks=="dynamic_strengthened_sig", "DP Boundary", ifelse(merged_coverage$peaks=="dynamic_weakened_sig", "DMSO Boundary", "Stable Boundary"))
merged_coverage$`Boundary Type` <- factor(merged_coverage$`Boundary Type`, levels=c("Stable Boundary", "DMSO Boundary", "DP Boundary"))
p = ggplot(data = merged_coverage, aes(x = V4, color=`Boundary Type`)) + geom_density(alpha=1, adjust=2, key_glyph = draw_key_path) + ggtitle("") + xlab("Number of TEs with CTCF Motif") + ylab("Density") + theme(text = element_text(size = 14), panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), panel.background = element_blank(), axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")) + scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "#F8766D", "#37a7db"))

pdf(paste0("3_allpeaks_te/bound_CTCF_TEnum.pdf"))
print(p)
dev.off()

Supp_4E = p

files=list.files("3_allpeaks_te/", pattern="*TEs.bed")
te_class = data.frame()
for (i in 1:3) {
  te=read.csv(paste0("3_allpeaks_te/", files[[i]]), sep = "", header=F)
  class_counts = te %>% group_by(V7) %>% dplyr::summarize(count = dplyr::n())
  class_counts$peaks = paste0(gsub("_peaks_CTCF_TEs.bed","",gsub("GSC_CTCF_","",files[[i]])))
  te_class = rbind(te_class, class_counts)
}
te_class = te_class[te_class$V7 %in% c("DNA","LTR","LINE","SINE","Retroposon"),]
te_class$peaks = ifelse(te_class$peaks=="downSig", "CTCF Lost", ifelse(te_class$peaks=="upSig", "CTCF Gained", "Unchanged"))
te_class$peaks <- factor(te_class$peaks, levels=c("Unchanged", "CTCF Lost", "CTCF Gained"))
p = ggplot(te_class, aes(x=peaks, y=count, fill=V7)) + geom_bar(position="fill", stat="identity", width=0.7) + theme(text = element_text(size = 14), panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), 
        panel.background = element_blank(), axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) + scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) + labs(fill = "TE Class") + xlab("Peak Type") + ylab("Percentage of TEs")

pdf(paste0("3_allpeaks_te/CTCF_TE_class.pdf"))
print(p)
dev.off()

Supp_4D = p

```

```{r}
txdb <- TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene
# Add Methylation data to the plot for methylation of these regions

methylc <- list.files("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/data/wgbs/methylcall/6_track_mergedCG", full.names = TRUE) %>% grep("_DMSO_|_DP_", ., value = TRUE) %>% grep("CG.methylC$", ., value = TRUE)
for (i in 1:20) {
  methyl = read.csv(methylc[[i]], sep = "", header = F)
  colnames(methyl) = c("seqnames", "start", "end", "type", "percent", "strand", "depth")
  methyl$mC = round(methyl$percent*methyl$depth)
  methyl = methyl[methyl$seqnames %in% c("chr1", "chr2", "chr3", "chr4", "chr5",
                                                              "chr6","chr7", "chr8", "chr9", "chr10",
                                                              "chr11", "chr12", "chr13", "chr14", "chr15",
                                                              "chr16", "chr17", "chr18", "chr19", "chr20",
                                                              "chr21", "chr22", "chrX", "chrY"),]
  methyl_gr = methyl %>% as_granges()
  
  methylAnno <- annotatePeak(methyl_gr, tssRegion=c(-3000, 3000),
                         TxDb=txdb, annoDb="org.Hs.eg.db")
  
  methylAnno_df <- methylAnno@anno %>% as.data.frame()
  
  df_modified <- methylAnno_df %>%
  mutate(annotation = ifelse(str_detect(annotation, "Intron"), "Intron", annotation)) %>%
    mutate(annotation = ifelse(str_detect(annotation, "Exon"), "Exon", annotation))

  
  collapsed_df <- df_modified %>%
      group_by(annotation) %>%
      summarise(
        Sum_mCG = sum(mC),
        Sum_CG = sum(depth)
      )
  collapsed_df$percent = collapsed_df$Sum_mCG/collapsed_df$Sum_CG
  
  p = ggplot(collapsed_df, aes(x=annotation, y=percent, fill = annotation)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity") + ylim(0,1) + theme(text = element_text(size = 14), panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), panel.background = element_blank(), axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"))
  
  names=gsub("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/data/wgbs/methylcall/6_track_mergedCG/", "", methylc)
  names=gsub(".CG.methylC.gz","", names)
  pdf(paste0("4_methyl/", names[[i]], "_anno.pdf"))
  print(p)
  dev.off()
}

```

```{r}
txdb <- TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene
# Add Methylation data to the plot for methylation of CTCF peaks

methylc <- list.files("4_methyl/", pattern = "methylC")
methylc <- methylc[!grepl("2kb.*methylC", methylc)]
final = data.frame()
for (i in 1:60) {
  methyl = read.csv(paste0("4_methyl/", methylc[[i]]), sep = "", header = F)
  colnames(methyl) = c("chr", "startCTCF", "endCTCF", "seqnames", "start", "end", "type", "percent", "strand", "depth", "overlap")
  methyl = methyl[methyl$depth >= 5,]
  methyl$mC = round(methyl$percent*methyl$depth)
  methyl$ID = paste(methyl$chr,methyl$startCTCF,methyl$endCTCF)
  
  collapsed_df <- methyl %>%
      group_by(ID) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(
        Sum_mCG = sum(mC),
        Sum_CG = sum(depth)
      )
  collapsed_df$percent = collapsed_df$Sum_mCG/collapsed_df$Sum_CG
  name=gsub(".CG.methylC","", methylc[[i]])
  avg=mean(collapsed_df$percent)
  row=c(name,avg)
  final=rbind(final,row)
}
colnames(final) = c("sample","averagemC")
final = separate_wider_delim(final, cols = sample, delim = "_", names = c("tissue", "TF","peaks","type",
                                                                          "cell","Treatment","rep"))

GSC = final[final$cell == "B36" | final$cell == "B49" | final$cell == "B66",]
GSC$peaks <- as.factor(GSC$peaks)
GSC$averagemC <- as.numeric(GSC$averagemC)
GSC$peaks = ifelse(GSC$peaks=="downSig", "CTCF Lost", ifelse(GSC$peaks=="upSig", "CTCF Gained", "Unchanged"))
GSC$peaks <- factor(GSC$peaks, levels=c("Unchanged", "CTCF Lost", "CTCF Gained"))

p = ggplot(GSC, aes(x=peaks, y=averagemC, fill=Treatment)) + geom_boxplot(outliers = FALSE) + theme(text = element_text(size = 14),  panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), panel.background = element_blank(), axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")) + ylab("Average mC Fraction") + xlab("Peak Type")

pdf("4_methyl/GSC_peak_averagemC.pdf")
print(p)
dev.off()

Fig_3D = p

```


```{r}
#library(ChIPseeker)
#library(TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene)
#txdb <- TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene
#library(clusterProfiler)
#library(plyranges)
#
## Add Methylation data to the plot for methylation of CTCF peaks over TEs
#
#methylc <- list.files("5_ctcf_methyl/", pattern = "methylC")
#methylc <- methylc[!grepl("kb.*methylC", methylc)]
#final = data.frame()
#for (i in 1:60) {
#  methyl = read.csv(paste0("5_ctcf_methyl/", methylc[[i]]), sep = "", header = F)
#  colnames(methyl) = c("chr", "startCTCF", "endCTCF", "motiflength", "CTCFstrand", "database", "score", "pval", "qval", "motif", "seqnames", #"start", "end", "type", "percent", "strand", "depth", "overlap")
#  methyl = methyl[methyl$depth >= 4,]
#  methyl$mC = round(methyl$percent*methyl$depth)
#  methyl$ID = paste(methyl$chr,methyl$startCTCF,methyl$endCTCF)
#  
#  collapsed_df <- methyl %>%
#      group_by(ID) %>%
#      summarise(
#        Sum_mCG = sum(mC),
#        Sum_CG = sum(depth)
#      )
#  collapsed_df$percent = collapsed_df$Sum_mCG/collapsed_df$Sum_CG
#  name=gsub(".CG.methylC.gz","", methylc[[i]])
#  avg=mean(collapsed_df$percent)
#  row=c(name,avg)
#  final=rbind(final,row)
#}
#colnames(final) = c("sample","averagemC")
#final = separate_wider_delim(final, cols = sample, delim = "_", names = c("tissue", "TF","peaks","type",
#                                                                          "cell","treatment","rep"))
#
#GSC = final[final$cell == "B36" | final$cell == "B49" | final$cell == "B66",]
#GSC$peaks <- as.factor(GSC$peaks)
#GSC$averagemC <- as.numeric(GSC$averagemC)
#
#p = ggplot(GSC, aes(x=peaks, y=averagemC, fill=treatment)) + geom_boxplot() + theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = #element_blank(), panel.background = element_blank(), axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")) + ylab("Average mC Percent") + xlab("Peak #Type")
#
#pdf("5_ctcf_methyl/GSC_TEctcf_averagemC.pdf")
#print(p)
#dev.off()

```


```{r}
setwd("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/3_CTCF")

data = read.table("6_TAD_ctcf/ctcf_TAD_change_overlap.txt", header=TRUE)
data=data[,c(1,3,5:8)]
data$bound_type=c("DP Boundary","DMSO Boundary","Stable Boundary")
colnames(data)=c("bound_type","CTCF Lost","CTCF Gained","Both","Unchanged","No CTCF")
data1 = data |> pivot_longer(cols = !bound_type, names_to = "peak_type", values_to = "count")
data1$count = as.numeric(data1$count)

data1$bound_type <- factor(data1$bound_type, levels=c("Stable Boundary", "DMSO Boundary", "DP Boundary"))
data1$peak_type <- factor(data1$peak_type, levels=c("CTCF Gained","Both","CTCF Lost","Unchanged","No CTCF"))

pdf(paste0("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/figures/ctcf_boundary_changes.pdf"),height=5,width=5)
p <- ggplot(data1, aes(x=bound_type, y=count, fill=peak_type)) + geom_bar(position="fill", stat="identity", width=0.7) + 
  xlab(NULL) + ylab("Percent of TAD Boundaries") + ylim(0,7000) + 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14), panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), 
        panel.background = element_blank(), axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) + scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#f44336","purple","#3d85c6","#F6caba","grey")) + 
  labs(fill="CTCF Peak Type")
print(p)
dev.off()

Fig_3B = p

data_matrix <- matrix(c(260, 30+260+9+353+21, 48, 152+48+12+397+27, 658, 429+658+55+3141+290), 
                      nrow = 3, 
                      byrow = TRUE)

# Name your rows and columns for clarity
rownames(data_matrix) <- c("Group A", "Group B", "Group C")
colnames(data_matrix) <- c("Success", "Failure")

# Run the test
chisq_result <- chisq.test(data_matrix)
chisq_result
chisq_result$p.value

data_matrix <- matrix(c(30, 30+260+9+353+21, 152, 152+48+12+397+27, 429, 429+658+55+3141+290), 
                      nrow = 3, 
                      byrow = TRUE)

# Name your rows and columns for clarity
rownames(data_matrix) <- c("Group A", "Group B", "Group C")
colnames(data_matrix) <- c("Success", "Failure")

# Run the test
chisq_result <- chisq.test(data_matrix)
chisq_result
chisq_result$p.value

```


```{r}
###CTCF peaks cumulative binding over TADs without differential CTCFf
files=list.files("6_TAD_ctcf/", pattern="stable.bed")

final=data.frame()
for (i in 1:length(files)) {
  data = read.table(paste0("6_TAD_ctcf/",files[[i]]))
  data=data[,c(1:3,27:42)]
  data1 <- data %>%
    group_by(V1,V2,V3) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(across(V30:V41, sum), .groups = 'drop')
  data2 = data.frame(chr = data1$V1,
                     start = data1$V2,
                     end = data1$V3,
                     B36_DMSO=(data1$V30+data1$V31)/2,
                     B36_DP=(data1$V32+data1$V33)/2,
                     B49_DMSO=(data1$V34+data1$V35)/2,
                     B49_DP=(data1$V36+data1$V37)/2,
                     B66_DMSO=(data1$V38+data1$V39)/2,
                     B66_DP=(data1$V40+data1$V41)/2)
  data3 = data2 |> pivot_longer(cols = !c(chr,start,end), names_to = "sample", values_to = "count")
  data3 = data3 %>%
    separate(col = sample,into = c("cell", "Treatment"),sep = "_",remove = FALSE)
  data3$bound_type = gsub("_CTCF_stable.bed","",files[[i]])
  final = rbind(final,data3)
}
final$bound_type=ifelse(final$bound_type=="dynamic_strengthened_sig", "DP Boundary", 
                        ifelse(final$bound_type=="dynamic_weakened_sig", "DMSO Boundary", "Stable Boundary"))

final$bound_type = factor(final$bound_type, levels=c("Stable Boundary","DMSO Boundary","DP Boundary"))

stat.test <- final %>%
  group_by(cell,bound_type) %>%
  t_test(count ~ Treatment, paired=TRUE) %>%
  add_significance() %>% add_xy_position(fun = "max", x = "cell", group="Treatment")
stat.test$xmax = stat.test$xmax - 0.2


p = ggboxplot(final, x = "cell", y = "count",
              fill = "Treatment", outliers = FALSE,
              #add = "jitter",
              facet.by = "bound_type", scales = "free_y", short.panel.labs = TRUE, xlab = "Cell Line", ylab = "Cummulative CTCF Signal") +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14), axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 45, hjust = 1), legend.position = "right") + 
  stat_pvalue_manual(stat.test[stat.test$cell=="B36",], label = "p.signif", y.position = 500, x = "cell", size = 4, remove.bracket = TRUE, hide.ns = TRUE) + 
  stat_pvalue_manual(stat.test[stat.test$cell=="B49",], label = "p.signif", y.position = 500, x = "cell", size = 4, remove.bracket = TRUE, hide.ns = TRUE) +
  stat_pvalue_manual(stat.test[stat.test$cell=="B66",], label = "p.signif", y.position = 500, x = "cell", size = 4, remove.bracket = TRUE, hide.ns = TRUE) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.1)))

pdf(paste0("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/figures/stable_ctcf_boundary_cummulative.pdf"),height=5,width=8)
print(p)
dev.off()

Fig_3E = p

```

```{r}
bound_ctcf = read.csv("6_TAD_ctcf/dynamic_sig_withDI_slop25kb_ctcf.bed", sep = "\t", header = FALSE)
bound_ctcf = bound_ctcf[,c(1:3,6,9,12,15,18,22,27:48)]

cols = colnames(bound_ctcf)
bound_ctcf_collapsed <- bound_ctcf %>% group_by(V1,V2,V3) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(across(c(cols[4:9]), mean), across(c(cols[13:24]), sum))

bound_mega = data.frame("B36_DMSO" = bound_ctcf_collapsed[,4],
                             "B36_DP" = bound_ctcf_collapsed[,5],
                             "B49_DMSO" = bound_ctcf_collapsed[,6],
                             "B49_DP" = bound_ctcf_collapsed[,7],
                             "B66_DMSO" = bound_ctcf_collapsed[,8],
                             "B66_DP" = bound_ctcf_collapsed[,9])

ctcf_mega = data.frame("B36_DMSO" = (bound_ctcf_collapsed[,10] + bound_ctcf_collapsed[,11])/2,
                        "B36_DP" = (bound_ctcf_collapsed[,12] + bound_ctcf_collapsed[,13])/2,
                        "B49_DMSO" = (bound_ctcf_collapsed[,14] + bound_ctcf_collapsed[,15])/2,
                        "B49_DP" = (bound_ctcf_collapsed[,16] + bound_ctcf_collapsed[,17])/2,
                        "B66_DMSO" = (bound_ctcf_collapsed[,18] + bound_ctcf_collapsed[,19])/2,
                        "B66_DP" = (bound_ctcf_collapsed[,20] + bound_ctcf_collapsed[,21])/2)

scaled_bound = t(scale(t(as.matrix(bound_mega))))
colnames(scaled_bound) = c("B36_DMSO","B36_DP","B49_DMSO","B49_DP","B66_DMSO","B66_DP")
scaled_ctcf = t(scale(t(as.matrix(ctcf_mega))))
colnames(scaled_ctcf) = c("B36_DMSO","B36_DP","B49_DMSO","B49_DP","B66_DMSO","B66_DP")

col_fun = circlize::colorRamp2(c(-3, 0, 3), c("lightblue", "white", "red"))
heatmap_TAD = ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(as.matrix(scaled_bound),
                                      col = col_fun,
                                      show_row_names = FALSE, 
                                      show_column_names = TRUE, 
                                      name="Boundary\nDelta DI\nZ-score",
                                      cluster_rows = TRUE,
                                      cluster_columns = FALSE,
                                      row_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
                                      row_title = NULL,
                                      use_raster = FALSE,
                                      row_split = 2,
                                      border = TRUE,
                                      column_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 14),
                                      heatmap_legend_param = list(
                                      title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14),
                                      labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14)))
#print(heatmap_TAD)


col_fun = circlize::colorRamp2(c(-3, 0, 3), c("skyblue", "white", "darkorange3"))
heatmap_ctcf = ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(as.matrix(scaled_ctcf),
                                       col = col_fun,
                                       show_row_names = FALSE, 
                                       show_column_names = TRUE, 
                                       name="CTCF Signal\nZ-score",
                                       cluster_rows = TRUE,
                                       cluster_columns = FALSE,
                                       row_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
                                       row_title = NULL,
                                       use_raster = FALSE,
                                       border = TRUE,
                                       column_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 14),
                                       heatmap_legend_param = list(
                                       title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14),
                                       labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14)))
#print(heatmap_ctcf)

pdf("tad_bd_ctcf.DI_delta_ctcf_mega_zscore.pdf",height=5,width=6)
print(heatmap_TAD+heatmap_ctcf)
dev.off()

tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".png")
png(tmp, width = 5, height = 5, units = "in", res = 600)
print(heatmap_TAD+heatmap_ctcf)
dev.off()

p_img <- png::readPNG(tmp)

p_gg <- ggplot() +
  annotation_raster(p_img, xmin = 0, xmax = 1, ymin = 0, ymax = 1) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1), clip = "on") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = NULL, expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = NULL, expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.margin    = margin(0, 0, 0, 0),
    axis.text      = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks     = element_blank(),
    axis.title     = element_blank(),
    panel.border   = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_blank()
  )

Fig_3F = p_gg

```

```{r}
#Fig2
layout <- "#AAAAA#BBB#####
           #AAAAA#BBB#####
           #######CCCDDDDD
           #######CCCDDDDD
           #######EEEEEFFF
           #######EEEEEFFF
           "

Fig3 <- wrap_plots(Fig_3A, Fig_3B, Fig_3D, Fig_3E, Fig_3F, Fig_3G, design = layout) &
    theme(plot.margin = margin(15, 15, 15, 15))

pdf(paste0("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/figures/Full_Figure3test.pdf"), width = 24, height = 24)
print(Fig3)
dev.off()

#Supp Fig4
layout <- "AAAAAAA#BBBBBBBB#CCCCCCCC
           AAAAAAA#BBBBBBBB#CCCCCCCC
           DDDDDD###################
           DDDDDD###################
           DDDDDD###################
           EEEEEE###################
           EEEEEE###################
           EEEEEE###################
           "

Supp_Fig4 <- wrap_plots(Supp_4A, Supp_4B, Supp_4C, Supp_4D, Supp_4E, design = layout) &
    theme(plot.margin = margin(25, 25, 25, 25)) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1, 1))

pdf(paste0("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/figures/Full_Supp_Figure4test.pdf"), width = 32, height = 18)
print(Supp_Fig4)
dev.off()

```


```{r}
#bound_ctcf = read.csv("6_TAD_ctcf/dynamic_sig_withDI_slop25kb_ctcf.bed", sep = "\t", header = FALSE)
##bound_ctcf[,48] = paste0(bound_ctcf$V27,":",bound_ctcf$V28,"-",bound_ctcf$V29)
#bound_ctcf[,48] = paste0(bound_ctcf$V27,":",bound_ctcf$V28-2000,"-",bound_ctcf$V29+2000)
#bound_ctcf = bound_ctcf[,c(1:3,6,9,12,15,18,22,27:48)]
#
#methylc <- list.files("4_methyl/", pattern = "2kb.CG.methylC")
#final = data.frame()
#for (i in 1:12) {
#  methyl1 = read.csv(paste0("4_methyl/", methylc[[0+i]]), sep = "", header = F)
#  methyl2 = read.csv(paste0("4_methyl/", methylc[[40+i]]), sep = "", header = F)
#  methyl3 = read.csv(paste0("4_methyl/", methylc[[20+i]]), sep = "", header = F)
#  colnames(methyl1) = c("chr", "startCTCF", "endCTCF", "seqnames", "start", "end", "type", "percent", "strand", "depth", "overlap")
#  colnames(methyl2) = c("chr", "startCTCF", "endCTCF", "seqnames", "start", "end", "type", "percent", "strand", "depth", "overlap")
#  colnames(methyl3) = c("chr", "startCTCF", "endCTCF", "seqnames", "start", "end", "type", "percent", "strand", "depth", "overlap")
#  methyl1 = methyl1[methyl1$depth > 4,]
#  methyl2 = methyl2[methyl2$depth > 4,]
#  methyl3 = methyl3[methyl3$depth > 4,]
#  methyl1$mC = round(methyl1$percent*methyl1$depth)
#  methyl1$ID = paste0(methyl1$chr,":",methyl1$startCTCF,"-",methyl1$endCTCF)
#  methyl2$mC = round(methyl2$percent*methyl2$depth)
#  methyl2$ID = paste0(methyl2$chr,":",methyl2$startCTCF,"-",methyl2$endCTCF)
#  methyl3$mC = round(methyl3$percent*methyl3$depth)
#  methyl3$ID = paste0(methyl3$chr,":",methyl3$startCTCF,"-",methyl3$endCTCF)
#  methyl = rbind(methyl1,methyl2)
#  #methyl = rbind(methyl,methyl3)
#  
#  #collapsed_df <- methyl %>%
#  #    group_by(ID) %>%
#  #    dplyr::summarise(
#  #      Sum_mCG = sum(mC),
#  #      Sum_CG = sum(depth)
#  #    )
#  #collapsed_df$percent = collapsed_df$Sum_mCG/collapsed_df$Sum_CG
#  
#  collapsed_df <- methyl %>%
#    group_by(ID) %>%
#    dplyr::summarise(
#      percent = mean(percent)
#    )
#  
#  colnames(collapsed_df)[2]=paste0(gsub("GSC_CTCF_downSig_peaks_","",gsub(".CG.methylC","", methylc[[0+i]])))
#  row=collapsed_df[,c(1,2)] %>% as.data.frame()
#  
#  if (i == 1) {
#    final=rbind(final,row)
#  } else {
#    final=merge(final,row, by.x = 1, by.y = 1)
#  }
#}
#bound_ctcf = bound_ctcf[bound_ctcf$V48 %in% final$ID,]
#for (i in 1:nrow(bound_ctcf)) {
#  bound_ctcf[i,32:43] = final[final$ID == bound_ctcf$V48[i],2:13]
#}
#
#cols = colnames(bound_ctcf)
#bound_ctcf_collapsed <- bound_ctcf %>% group_by(V1,V2,V3) %>%
#  dplyr::summarise(across(c(cols[4:9]), mean), across(c(cols[13:24]), sum))
#
#bound_mega = data.frame("B36_DMSO" = bound_ctcf_collapsed[,4],
#                        "B36_DP" = bound_ctcf_collapsed[,5],
#                        "B49_DMSO" = bound_ctcf_collapsed[,6],
#                        "B49_DP" = bound_ctcf_collapsed[,7],
#                        "B66_DMSO" = bound_ctcf_collapsed[,8],
#                        "B66_DP" = bound_ctcf_collapsed[,9])
#
#ctcf_mega = data.frame("B36_DMSO" = (bound_ctcf_collapsed[,10] + bound_ctcf_collapsed[,11])/2,
#                       "B36_DP" = (bound_ctcf_collapsed[,12] + bound_ctcf_collapsed[,13])/2,
#                       "B49_DMSO" = (bound_ctcf_collapsed[,14] + bound_ctcf_collapsed[,15])/2,
#                       "B49_DP" = (bound_ctcf_collapsed[,16] + bound_ctcf_collapsed[,17])/2,
#                       "B66_DMSO" = (bound_ctcf_collapsed[,18] + bound_ctcf_collapsed[,19])/2,
#                       "B66_DP" = (bound_ctcf_collapsed[,20] + bound_ctcf_collapsed[,21])/2)
#
#methyl_mega = data.frame("B36_DMSO" = (bound_ctcf_collapsed[,22] + bound_ctcf_collapsed[,23])/2,
#                         "B36_DP" = (bound_ctcf_collapsed[,24] + bound_ctcf_collapsed[,25])/2,
#                         "B49_DMSO" = (bound_ctcf_collapsed[,26] + bound_ctcf_collapsed[,27])/2,
#                         "B49_DP" = (bound_ctcf_collapsed[,28] + bound_ctcf_collapsed[,29])/2,
#                         "B66_DMSO" = (bound_ctcf_collapsed[,30] + bound_ctcf_collapsed[,31])/2,
#                         "B66_DP" = (bound_ctcf_collapsed[,32] + bound_ctcf_collapsed[,33])/2)
#
#scaled_bound = t(scale(t(as.matrix(bound_mega))))
#colnames(scaled_bound) = c("B36_DMSO","B36_DP","B49_DMSO","B49_DP","B66_DMSO","B66_DP")
#scaled_ctcf = t(scale(t(as.matrix(ctcf_mega))))
#colnames(scaled_ctcf) = c("B36_DMSO","B36_DP","B49_DMSO","B49_DP","B66_DMSO","B66_DP")
#
#col_fun = circlize::colorRamp2(c(-3, 0, 3), c("lightblue", "white", "red"))
#heatmap_TAD = ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(as.matrix(scaled_bound),
#                                      col = col_fun,
#                                      show_row_names = FALSE, 
#                                      show_column_names = TRUE, 
#                                      name="deltaDI_Zscore",
#                                      cluster_rows = TRUE,
#                                      cluster_columns = FALSE,
#                                      row_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
#                                      row_title = NULL,
#                                      use_raster = FALSE,
#                                      border = TRUE)
##print(heatmap_TAD)
#
#
#col_fun = circlize::colorRamp2(c(-3, 0, 3), c("skyblue", "white", "darkorange3"))
#heatmap_ctcf = ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(as.matrix(scaled_ctcf),
#                                       col = col_fun,
#                                       show_row_names = FALSE, 
#                                       show_column_names = TRUE, 
#                                       name="CTCF_Zscore",
#                                       cluster_rows = TRUE,
#                                       cluster_columns = FALSE,
#                                       row_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
#                                       row_title = NULL,
#                                       use_raster = FALSE,
#                                       border = TRUE)
##print(heatmap_ctcf)
#
#col_fun = circlize::colorRamp2(c(0,0.5, 1), c("lightblue", "white", "red"))
#heatmap_methyl = ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(as.matrix(methyl_mega),
#                                         col = col_fun,
#                                         show_row_names = FALSE, 
#                                         show_column_names = TRUE, 
#                                         name="mCG%",
#                                         cluster_rows = TRUE,
#                                         cluster_columns = FALSE,
#                                         row_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
#                                         row_title = NULL,
#                                         use_raster = FALSE,
#                                         border = TRUE)
##print(heatmap_methyl)
#
#
#pdf("tad_bd_ctcf.DI_delta_ctcf_mega_zscore.pdf",height=5,width=6)
#print(heatmap_TAD+heatmap_ctcf)
#dev.off()

```


Add a new chunk by clicking the *Insert Chunk* button on the toolbar or by pressing *Ctrl+Alt+I*.

When you save the notebook, an HTML file containing the code and output will be saved alongside it (click the *Preview* button or press *Ctrl+Shift+K* to preview the HTML file).

The preview shows you a rendered HTML copy of the contents of the editor. Consequently, unlike *Knit*, *Preview* does not run any R code chunks. Instead, the output of the chunk when it was last run in the editor is displayed.
